item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.7

  • 📱 Bottom navigation fix - the bottom navigation bar now displays correctly on Android and iOS
  • 🖼️ Fundraiser card covers - cards now show their cover photo, with sensitive media kept blurred on Explore and Popular
  • 🔔 Notification taps - group and project access-request notifications now open the right screen
  • ✨ Various fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.6

  • 🙈 Sensitive-content covers - flagged photos and videos are blurred behind a tap-to-view warning, on posts, sparks, fundraisers and charities
  • 🎵 Music & credits - add a song or a credit to your posts and stories, shown to viewers
  • 🕒 Clearer "last seen" - chat now shows a simple relative time instead of a confusing clock
  • ✨ Various fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.5

  • 📨 Share to BakkMe members - send posts, sparks and more straight to other members
  • 🔗 Rich link previews in chat - shared links now unfurl with image and title
  • 💚 Smoother donations & tips - in your language, details prefilled, with a clear receipt and fee breakdown
  • 🌍 Support more fundraisers from iPhone, including mobile-money campaigns

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.3

  • 📤 Smoother sharing - a photo with a caption no longer posts a duplicate message
  • 🔴 Recorded lives - the progress bar no longer stalls during playback
  • 🧾 Accurate receipts - donation & tip PDFs are correct and open when shared
  • ✨ Correct currency on recorded lives, a clearer fee breakdown, and a banner that stays dismissed

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.2

  • 💸 Tips & page support on more rails - mobile money or bank, not just cards
  • 🔴 Recorded lives - follow hosts and see view counts
  • 📊 Pages & charities - now show amount raised and supporter counts
  • 🧾 Clearer fees, a smoother feed, and a faster Impact page

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
What's New in Version 1.0.0

  • 🚀 Initial Release - Welcome to BakkMe!
  • 💰 Fundraising - Create and manage fundraising campaigns
  • 👥 Social Features - Connect with friends and community
  • 💬 Messaging - End-to-end encrypted chat
